Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add comprehensive docstrings and API documentation

Backend Documentation:
- Add detailed module-level docstrings to all backend files
- Document Task model with complete attribute descriptions
- Enhance database.py with connection and session documentation
- Expand routes.py module docstring with RESTful endpoint overview
- CRUD operations already had excellent docstrings

Test Documentation:
- Add comprehensive module-level docstrings to all test files
- Document pytest fixtures with detailed usage examples
- Enhance conftest.py with fixture scope and purpose descriptions
- Document test classes and their coverage areas
- Include test coverage summaries in module docstrings

API Documentation (docs/API.md):
- Complete endpoint reference with all 9 endpoints
- Request/response examples in JSON for every endpoint
- Detailed query parameter tables with types and defaults
- HTTP status code explanations (200, 201, 204, 404, 422)
- Authentication notes (currently no auth, future JWT plans)
- Data models with field descriptions
- Error handling patterns and examples
- Rate limiting recommendations
- Interactive documentation links (Swagger/ReDoc)
- Complete workflow examples with curl commands
- Pagination, filtering, and search examples

Documentation Benefits:
- Improves code maintainability and onboarding
- Provides clear API contract for frontend developers
- Enables auto-generated documentation tools
- Facilitates testing and debugging
- Follows Python PEP 257 docstring conventions
